title: Bridge Essay: Transcendental experiences during meditation practice.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Breath/Soul** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Breath-brain coupling, pranayama, cardiorespiratory entrainment, vagal pathways of consciousness.

**Transcendental experiences during meditation practice.** — Ann N Y Acad Sci. PMID: 24673148. DOI: 10.1111/nyas.12316. This article explores transcendental experiences during meditation practice and the integration of transcendental experiences and the unfolding of higher states of consciousness with waking, dreaming, and sleeping. The subject/object relationship during transcendental experiences is characterized by the absence of time, space, and body sense--the framework that gives meaning to waking experiences.
